productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid Olive Jacket
description: Composition Olive green jacket made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with double button cuffs, mock collar with a buttoned closure and knitted inner collar, zippered front closure, two insert pockets with asymmetric button closures, embroidered branding on the left chest, brand tab stitched on the back of the collar and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations This jacket from US Polo is inspired by classic sport style staples. The sleek finish offers style doubled with comfort. The soft cotton fabric enables this jacket to be a wardrobe favourite in all seasons. Layer this over tees, denims and suede shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
